headline: Why The Narrative Around W. P. Carey (WPC) Is Shifting With New Balance Sheet And Deal Updates
summary: The consensus fair value estimate for W. P. Carey has shifted from US$74.83 to US$77.36, a roughly 3% move in the target price that many investors track closely. Analysts tying this change to a refreshed balance sheet, comments on "attractive" investment spreads, and sector level model updates are split on whether the stock’s current valuation already reflects much of the expected execution on future deals. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these evolving views and keep up with...
